wildlife_corridor.title: Sealed Maintenance Push
wildlife_corridor.summary: A short corridor that wasn't open last week. Whatever's inside is breathing in the wrong rhythm.
wildlife_corridor.rumour: wire:// somebody pushed past a maintenance seal that wasn't there yesterday.

narrate: The seal is fresh-cracked, not a Branwen mark on it. Somebody has been here before — or something has come out.
Past the encounter the corridor opens to a small bay.
You reseal the corridor. The City exhales without you in it.
Whatever opened the seal is still in there, breathing.
You back out and lock the seal as best you can.
Nothing taken, nothing lost — except some of the night.
You wake on a clinic gurney. Dr. Ilex hasn't said a word about the bill yet.

ROOM_FLAVOR: The air beyond tastes of coolant and pet dander.
Something is moving further in — three small breaths, not synchronised.
Your light catches scuff-marks at knee height. Whatever lives here is not the right shape.
The corridor's emergency strip is on. It shouldn't be on. Nothing is broken enough to trigger it.
LOOT_FLAVOR: An iron rack of pre-Crisis hand tools. Most stripped, one isn't.
A toolbox tucked behind a coolant pipe, Branwen-blue chalk on the lid.
Three crates marked Halen-Coil. Two empty. The third sealed.
A scrubber's locker. Spare gloves, a hand torch, and something heavier wrapped in oilcloth.
